title: ServerOptimisationPack
body:
This serverpack just adds a few optimisation mods, along with minimal server management mods.

<details>
<summary>Mods (full list in changenotes)</summary>

- [AntiXray](https://modrinth.com/mod/sml2FMaA)
- [Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/vEC2jm6I)
- [Auto Log Remover](https://modrinth.com/mod/sf8uqozh)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs)
- [Footprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/1dy7kepT)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm)
- [Ledger](https://modrinth.com/mod/LVN9ygNV)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/qQyHxfxd)
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/hasdd01q)
- [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/4WWQxlQP)
- [Slumber](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksm6XRZ9)
- [StackDeobfuscator](https://modrinth.com/mod/NusMqsjF)
- [TT20](https://modrinth.com/mod/YS3ZignI)
- [View Distance Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/nxrXbh5K)
- [Worldthreader](https://modrinth.com/mod/LwH5rYyd)
- [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/l6YH9Als)

</details>

Wherein these mods are of special interest:
- AntiXray
- Auto Log Remover
- Footprint
- Ledger
- No Chat Reports
- Slumber

Since I don't maintain the mods I try to keep the list short but effective so I can release the modpack for new versions without waiting a long time for individual mods to update.

This is more of a personal project, and I don't guarantee any kind of support or quick updates.
